name: Ginger-Soy Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a small bowl.
2. Use the marinade to marinate meat, fish, or chicken for at least an hour, turning occasionally to coat evenly.
3. The remaining marinade can be used to baste meat while it is cooking.
4. Makes 3/4 cup, serving 4.
5. Food Exchange per serving: FREE; CAL: 46; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 6g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 202mg; FAT: 0g.
